# fly_mpg_cluster (Resource)

Manages a Fly.io Managed Postgres (MPG) cluster. Import using the cluster name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_mpg_cluster" "example" {
  name             = "my-mpg-cluster"
  org              = "personal"
  region           = "iad"
  plan             = "launch-2"
  volume_size      = 10
  pg_major_version = 16
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the cluster. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `org` (String) The organization slug. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `region` (String) The primary region. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `enable_postgis` (Boolean) Enable PostGIS extension. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `pg_major_version` (Number) PostgreSQL major version. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `plan` (String) The plan (e.g., free, starter, standard). Changing this forces a new resource.
- `volume_size` (Number) Volume size in GB. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the cluster.
- `primary_region` (String) The primary region (computed from status).
- `status` (String) The cluster status.
